Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX surges after Wall Street rebounds; Unemployment rises
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has jumped higher at the open as pressure from the bond market eased overnight and oil prices fell after President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” of its war with Iran.

news.title: ASX drops amid global volatility
news.snippet: Australian shares have plunged amid uncertainty surrounding the federal budget and fears surging global bond yields could trigger rate rises in the US.

news.title: ‘Ugly’: Jobless rate up, 18.5k jobs lost
news.snippet: Australia’s latest unemployment rate has been revealed as inflation bites businesses and slashes margins.

news.title: Dreaming big: Elon Musk’s $2.5 trillion vision is about to become reality
news.snippet: The prospectus for the sharemarket float of SpaceX has been filed. The mega IPO’s real value lies in the eyes and hopes of the beholders, and their faith in Elon Musk,

news.title: Advance goes all-in on emerging high-grade gold plays in Victoria
news.snippet: Advance Metals is taking full control of its high-grade Victorian gold projects after drilling success and metallurgical testwork uncovered a bonanza-grade opportunity.

news.title: Aussie state missing $8bn after Iran war
news.snippet: Australia’s biggest state will likely receive $8bn less in a key tax as it grapples with inflation and fallout from the Iran war.

news.title: Viking uncovers hidden tungsten prize in Nevada stockpile
news.snippet: Viking Mines has identified two additional surface rock stockpiles containing visible tungsten mineralisation during field campaigns in Nevada.

news.title: James Murdoch buys New York magazine, Vox podcasts for $419 million
news.snippet: Murdoch said the acquisition “reflects both our interest in the forward edge of culture and our deep commitment to ambitious journalism and agenda-setting conversations”.

news.title: Bezos calls for 0pc income tax for 50pc of people
news.snippet: One of the world’s richest men, Jeff Bezos, has a radical idea that would flip income tax on its head. It has the whole world talking.

news.title: Call for ‘bold’ Liberals after diabolical poll
news.snippet: The Liberal Party will need to be its “most bold, confident” off the back of bruising polling, the shadow treasurer claims.

news.title: State set for major nursing recruitment drive
news.snippet: One state government has accelerated nurse recruitment beyond its current 900 new hires a year to improve the treatment of patients in public hospitals.

news.title: Locksley jags rich antimony beneath old Californian mine
news.snippet: Locksley Resources has hit high-grade antimony below historic mine workings in California, peaking at 33.51% antimony in a maiden diamond drill program.
